mapper.select: select email from `user` where id = (select user_id from schedule where id = #{id}) and status in ('active', 'admin')

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, description, category, region, detail_region AS detailRegion, chat_link AS chatLink, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, recruit_start_date AS recruitStartDate, recruit_end_date AS recruitEndDate, min_participants AS minParticipants, max_participants AS maxParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, age_min AS ageMin, age_max AS ageMax, gender_limit AS genderLimit, total_price AS totalPrice, cost_type AS costType, thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, view_count AS viewCount, status, is_public AS isPublic, cancel_deadline AS cancelDeadline, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM schedule WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT s.id, s.user_id AS userId, s.title, s.description, s.category, s.region, s.detail_region AS detailRegion, s.chat_link AS chatLink, s.start_date AS startDate, s.end_date AS endDate, s.recruit_start_date AS recruitStartDate, s.recruit_end_date AS recruitEndDate, s.min_participants AS minParticipants, s.max_participants AS maxParticipants, s.current_participants AS currentParticipants, s.age_min AS ageMin, s.age_max AS ageMax, s.gender_limit AS genderLimit, s.total_price AS totalPrice, s.cost_type AS costType, s.thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, s.view_count AS viewCount, s.status, s.is_public AS isPublic, s.cancel_deadline AS cancelDeadline, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_at AS updatedAt, s.deleted_at AS deletedAt, CASE WHEN #{email} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{email}) = '' THEN FALSE ELSE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = b.user_id WHERE b.schedule_id = s.id AND u.email = #{email} ) END AS isBookmarked FROM schedule s WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM schedule_detail WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY day_number ASC
SELECT * FROM schedule_image WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY id asc
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE schedule SET current_participants = current_participants + 1 WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND current_participants < max_participants
UPDATE schedule SET current_participants = CASE WHEN current_participants > 0 THEN current_participants - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND current_participants > 0
UPDATE schedule SET status = 'closed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'recruiting' AND current_participants >= max_participants

UPDATE schedule SET status = 'recruiting', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'closed' AND current_participants < max_participants AND (recruit_end_date IS NULL OR recruit_end_date >= CURDATE()) AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURDATE())
UPDATE schedule SET status = #{targetStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'completed'
UPDATE schedule SET status = 'canceled', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{scheduleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('recruiting', 'closed')
UPDATE schedule SET status = 'closed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'recruiting' AND recruit_end_date < CURDATE() AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT s.*, CASE WHEN #{email} IS NULL OR TRIM(#{email}) = '' THEN FALSE ELSE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = b.user_id WHERE b.schedule_id = s.id AND u.email = #{email} ) END AS isBookmarked FROM schedule s
s.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( s.is_public IS NULL OR s.is_public != 0
OR s.user_id = #{viewerUserId}
)
AND ( s.status = 'recruiting' OR ( s.status = 'closed' AND s.current_participants >= s.max_participants AND (s.recruit_end_date IS NULL OR s.recruit_end_date >= CURDATE()) ) )
AND s.category = #{category}
AND ( UPPER(s.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{keyword}), '%') OR UPPER(s.description) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{keyword}), '%') )
AND UPPER(TRIM(s.region)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{region}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(s.detail_region)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{district}))
AND s.gender_limit = #{genderLimit}
AND (s.end_date IS NULL OR s.end_date >= #{startDate})
AND (s.start_date IS NULL OR s.start_date <= #{endDate})
ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.recruit_end_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.recruit_end_date ASC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.recruit_end_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.recruit_end_date DESC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.start_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.start_date ASC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.start_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.start_date DESC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY s.id DESC
mapper.insert: insert into schedule (user_id, title, description, category, region, detail_region, chat_link, start_date, end_date, recruit_start_date, recruit_end_date, min_participants, max_participants, current_participants, age_min, age_max, gender_limit, total_price, cost_type, thumbnail_image, view_count, status, is_public, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{region}, #{detailRegion}, #{chatLink}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{recruitStartDate}, #{recruitEndDate}, #{minParticipants}, #{maxParticipants}, 1, #{ageMin}, #{ageMax}, #{genderLimit}, #{totalPrice}, #{costType}, #{thumbnailImage}, 0, 'recruiting', 1, NOW())
insert into schedule_detail (schedule_id, day_number, title, description) values (#{scheduleId}, #{dayNumber}, #{title}, #{description})

insert into schedule_image (schedule_id, image_url, is_thumbnail) values
( #{scheduleId}, #{url}, case when #{idx} = 0 then 1 else 0 end )
mapper.update: update schedule set title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, region = #{region}, detail_region = #{detailRegion}, chat_link = #{chatLink}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, recruit_start_date = #{recruitStartDate}, recruit_end_date = #{recruitEndDate}, min_participants = #{minParticipants}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, age_min = #{ageMin}, age_max = #{ageMax}, gender_limit = #{genderLimit}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, cost_type = #{costType}, thumbnail_image = #{thumbnailImage}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into schedule_image (schedule_id, image_url, is_thumbnail) values
(#{scheduleId}, #{url}, 0)
mapper.select: select image_url from schedule_image where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} order by id asc limit 1

SELECT DISTINCT cards.id, cards.userId, cards.title, cards.region, cards.detailRegion, cards.startDate, cards.endDate, cards.thumbnailImage, cards.currentParticipants, cards.maxParticipants, cards.status, cards.createdAt FROM ( /* * 위트 로그는 "내가 완료까지 경험한 일정"을 보여주는 영역이다. * 그래서 approved participation이 있는 완료 일정뿐 아니라, * 과거 데이터처럼 participation row가 없더라도 내가 직접 생성한 completed 일정도 포함해야 한다. * * 왜 host/participant 두 경로를 나누는가? * - 최신 일정은 생성 시 host participation row 가 자동 생성될 수 있음 * - 하지만 과거 데이터나 누락 데이터는 participation row 가 없을 수 있음 * 그래서 participation 존재를 전제하지 않고, host completed 집합과 approved 참여 completed 집합을 각각 읽어 UNION 한다. */ SELECT s.id, s.user_id AS userId, s.title, s.region, s.detail_region AS detailRegion, s.start_date AS startDate, s.end_date AS endDate, s.thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, s.current_participants AS currentParticipants, s.max_participants AS maxParticipants, s.status, s.created_at AS createdAt FROM schedule s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
UNION
SELECT s.id, s.user_id AS userId, s.title, s.region, s.detail_region AS detailRegion, s.start_date AS startDate, s.end_date AS endDate, s.thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, s.current_participants AS currentParticipants, s.max_participants AS maxParticipants, s.status, s.created_at AS createdAt FROM participation p INNER JOIN schedule s ON s.id = p.schedule_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} -- 참여 일정은 승인까지 완료된 사용자만 "실제로 함께한 일정"으로 간주한다. AND p.status = 'approved' AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ) cards -- UNION 으로 중복 제거 후에도 노출 순서는 종료일 최신순을 유지한다. ORDER BY cards.endDate DESC, cards.id DESC
